decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's mana base by destroying their lands and slowing down their spells with cards like Sphere of Resistance, while also using Oath of Druids to cheat out big creatures like Terravore. The deck aims to control the game by denying resources to the opponent and establishing a strong board presence with efficient creatures. It also includes ways to handle threats with cards like Pyroclasm and Naturalize. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game and winning through powerful creatures and resource denial.

The Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy, aiming to quickly deplete the opponent's resources and life total. With efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Phyrexian Negator, along with disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, the deck puts pressure on the opponent while controlling the board. The deck also includes card draw in Phyrexian Arena to maintain card advantage. Mishra's Factory and Wasteland provide additional utility and disruption. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruption spells to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on quickly generating mana through a strong Elf synergy to power out big threats like Masticore and Deranged Hermit. With a mix of ramp and aggressive creatures, it aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful board presence. Key cards like Wirewood Symbiote and Quirion Ranger allow for flexibility and resilience, while Survival of the Fittest acts as a toolbox to find the right creatures for any situation. The deck's aggressive strategy is supported by a solid mana base and versatile removal options like Naturalize.

The deck focuses on using creatures with strong ETB effects and graveyard recursion, along with disruption spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, to control the game and outvalue the opponent. The key strategy is to utilize Survival of the Fittest to tutor for the right creatures at the right time, while also abusing cards like Recurring Nightmare to constantly recur powerful creatures from the graveyard. By using a mix of control elements and powerful creature synergy, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and grind out a win through incremental advantage.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to put pressure early on. The deck also includes cards like Goblin Matron and Siege-Gang Commander to provide card advantage and additional threats. With cards like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Warchief boosting the power of Goblin creatures, the deck aims to quickly deal damage to the opponent and finish the game before they can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes disruption with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt opponent's mana base and keep them on the back foot.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures for value and control, using cards like Survival of the Fittest and Natural Order to tutor for key creatures. The deck also includes various disruptive elements like Winter Orb and Opposition to slow down the opponent's game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency, including cards like Gaea's Cradle for ramp and fixing. The key strategy revolves around maintaining board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan, leading to a gradual advantage and ultimately securing a victory through resource manipulation and control.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy by utilizing discard spells such as Duress and bottomless pit, while controlling the board with cards like Hypnotic Specter and Skittering Skirge. The goal is to keep the opponent's hand empty and reduce their resources, eventually winning the game through attrition with cards like The Rack and Cursed Scroll. The deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Innocent Blood to deal with threats efficiently. Additionally, it uses Mishra's Factory and Wasteland for mana denial and to maintain control of the battlefield.

This deck aims to control the game by utilizing a mix of counterspells, removal, and protection effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy while gradually building up board presence. The key strategy involves using creatures like Exalted Angel and Silver Knight for defense, along with cards like Meddling Mage and Standstill to control the opponent's options. With a mix of disruption, protection, and card advantage, this archetype aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through careful resource management and strategic play.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania to cast powerful creatures like Deranged Hermit and Masticore. Survival of the Fittest enables tutoring for key creatures, while Quirion Ranger and Wirewood Symbiote provide flexibility and protection. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing the synergy and tribal effects of Elves to create a powerful board presence. Gaea's Cradle and Wasteland provide additional mana support and disruption, allowing for explosive plays and control over the battlefield.

The main focus of this deck is to use enchantress effects to generate card advantage and mana acceleration, while setting up a powerful combo win condition with cards like Replenish and Opalescence. The deck aims to control the board with enchantments like Elephant Grass and Seal of Cleansing, while also having access to powerful tutor effects with cards like Sterling Grove. By efficiently ramping up mana and drawing cards, this deck can quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with a massive board presence.

This goblin deck focuses on playing low-cost creatures quickly to overwhelm the opponent with an aggressive strategy. Key cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief help to accelerate the board presence, while cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander deal massive damage quickly. The deck also includes some removal and disruption with cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Wasteland. With a mix of speed and power, this deck aims to quickly dominate the battlefield and deal enough damage to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's hand and board presence while dealing consistent damage with The Rack and Hypnotic Specter. Using a combination of discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, along with removal spells like Smother and Vendetta, it aims to control the game and slowly chip away at the opponent's life total. The inclusion of cards like Phyrexian Arena provides card advantage, while Mishra's Factory offers a resilient creature threat. Overall, the deck aims to grind out wins through attrition and resource denial.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures and control elements to achieve a dominant board state. Key cards like Natural Order and Survival of the Fittest help tutor for powerful creatures, while Winter Orb and Opposition disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck includes a mix of mana creatures, card draw, and removal spells to provide versatility and consistency. With strong mana acceleration from Gaea's Cradle and efficient creatures like Birds of Paradise, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful threats and reactive spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Stasis card to lock down the opponent's ability to untap lands, while using other cards like Howling Mine and Black Vise to control and deplete their resources. It aims to create a stall situation where the opponent is unable to play effectively, while the player can continue to draw cards and maintain control. The deck also includes various counter spells and bounce effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect the stasis lock.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using counterspells and stifle effects while quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo to win the game. By disrupting opponents' plans and efficiently drawing cards with spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush, the deck aims to pressure opponents and create a win condition that is difficult to stop. The deck is designed to be fast and versatile, with options to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect its own game plan.

The main focus of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's hand and resources through various discard spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, while also applying pressure with creatures like Hypnotic Specter and The Rack. The deck also utilizes disruptive cards like Cursed Scroll and Bottomless Pit to control the opponent's board state. With a mix of removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict, as well as land destruction with Wasteland, this deck aims to establish control of the game and outvalue the opponent through attrition and resource denial.
